message:
feat(fm-layout): implement proper Sugiyama cycle removal and crossing minimization

Major overhaul of the graph layout engine with proper cycle-breaking algorithm:

fm-layout:
- Replace naive index-based cycle detection with Greedy-FAS (Feedback Arc Set)
  algorithm using degree-driven source/sink elimination for stable results
- Add stable_node_priorities() for deterministic tie-breaking based on node
  declaration order and identifier hashes
- Introduce OrientedEdge struct for cleaner edge traversal during layout
- Implement proper remove_node() helper with correct degree accounting
- Track ordering_by_rank through crossing minimization for coordinate assignment
- Pass rank ordering to coordinate_assignment() for proper horizontal positioning
- Support GraphDirection from fm-core for direction-aware layout

fm-render-canvas:
- Extract context.rs module for canvas 2D rendering context abstraction
- Extract viewport.rs module for pan/zoom viewport transformation logic
- Update lib.rs to integrate new modular rendering architecture

Also syncs beads issue tracker with latest development state.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
